languages.text: "Ваши деяния привели меня к дверям этого дворца, Себериан. Я долго ш{mf|ел|ла} по вашему следу".
"Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."
languages.original_text: "Ваши деяния привели меня к дверям этого дворца, Себериан. Я долго ш{mf|ел|ла} по вашему следу".

traits.locale_text: "Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."
"Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."
"Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."

languages.text: “塞贝里安，是你的所作所为，把我引到了这座宫殿的门前。我已经追踪你很长时间了。”
languages.original_text: "Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安，是你的所作所为，把我引到了这座宫殿的门前。我已经追踪你很长时间了。”

languages.text: « Par vos agissements, c'est vous qui m'avez {mf|conduit|conduite} jusqu'aux portes de ce palais, Seberian. Je vous suis à la trace depuis un bon moment déjà. »
languages.original_text: "Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."

traits.locale_text: « Par vos agissements, c'est vous qui m'avez {mf|conduit|conduite} jusqu'aux portes de ce palais, Seberian. Je vous suis à la trace depuis un bon moment déjà. »

languages.text: "İcraatların beni bu sarayın kapılarına kadar getirdi Seberian. Bir süredir izini sürüyorum."
languages.original_text: "Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."

traits.locale_text: "İcraatların beni bu sarayın kapılarına kadar getirdi Seberian. Bir süredir izini sürüyorum."

languages.text: «Sus hazañas me han traído a las puertas de este palacio, Seberian. Llevo un tiempo siguiendo su rastro».
languages.original_text: "Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."

traits.locale_text: «Sus hazañas me han traído a las puertas de este palacio, Seberian. Llevo un tiempo siguiendo su rastro».

languages.text: "Eure Taten haben mich an die Tore dieses Palastes geführt, Seberian. Ich folge Eurer Spur schon seit geraumer Zeit."
languages.original_text: "Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Taten haben mich an die Tore dieses Palastes geführt, Seberian. Ich folge Eurer Spur schon seit geraumer Zeit."

languages.text: 「あなたの行いによって、私はこの宮殿の門にたどり着いた、シベリア。あなたの足跡をしばらく追ってきた」
languages.original_text: "Your deeds have brought me to the doors of this palace, Seberian. I have been following your trail for some time."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの行いによって、私はこの宮殿の門にたどり着いた、シベリア。あなたの足跡をしばらく追ってきた」
